productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Mind Body Soul Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, flattened seam and printed labelFittingComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Mystify your mind, let the body be natural and seek your soul to start your day in this white t-shirt from urban yoga.
